summary: Promoted ADR 0289 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.153` and platform version `0.130.97` after replaying Label Studio from the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline on source commit `cb7a375c784347f600f136a73ed91991808fb828`, preserving the earlier rebased exact-main success on `0.177.152` / `0.130.95`, repairing shared Coolify apps truth drift exposed by the rebase, and re-verifying the public oauth2-proxy redirect boundary at `annotate.lv3.org`.

verification.observed: After `origin/main` advanced to `26e6849be` while this workstream was in flight, the final replay from merged head `cb7a375c784347f600f136a73ed91991808fb828` succeeded with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=492 changed=144 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=73 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=100 changed=5 failed=0`, and `localhost ok=22 changed=0 failed=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-converge-r8-0.177.153.txt`.

The first post-rebase generator and converge attempts exposed stale shared `coolify_apps` truth after ADR 0340 landed on main, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-generate-edge-static-sites-r1-0.177.152.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-converge-r6-0.177.152.txt`; after repairing the shared service catalogs and capacity model, the rebased exact-main replay succeeded on the `0.177.152` / `0.130.95` baseline, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-converge-r7-0.177.152.txt`.

Standalone curl verification preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-public-head-r4-0.177.153.txt` confirms both `https://annotate.lv3.org/` and `https://annotate.lv3.org/api/projects` return `302` redirects into `https://annotate.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in`, preserving the shared oauth2-proxy and Keycloak browser boundary.

verification.check: Protected truth refresh and workstream validation
verification.observed: The final integration refreshed the ADR index, canonical truth, diagrams, platform manifest, subdomain exposure registry, and generated edge portals in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-generate-adr-index-r4-0.177.153.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-canonical-truth-r2-0.177.153.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-generate-diagrams-r1-0.177.153.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-platform-manifest-r1-0.177.153.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-subdomain-exposure-r1-0.177.153.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-generate-edge-static-sites-r3-0.177.153.txt`; the repo automation gate for agent standards, workstream surfaces, and health probes also passed in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0289-label-studio-mainline-validate-repo-r3-0.177.153.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0289 on repository version `0.177.153` and the first verified platform promotion to `0.130.97`.

The latest realistic mainline baseline was inconsistent when this workstream reached it: `VERSION` still read `0.177.152` while `versions/stack.yaml` already read `0.177.153` / `0.130.96`. This closeout repaired those protected release surfaces while preserving the live apply proof from merged head `cb7a375c784347f600f136a73ed91991808fb828`.

The automated release-manager write path remained blocked by unrelated active workstreams `ws-0330-public-github-readiness` and `ws-0340-implementation`, so the `0.177.153` release surfaces were reconciled manually as part of this exact-main integration.

correction_loop.surface: Rebased and latest-main Label Studio exact-main replay
correction_loop.repair_action: Repaired the shared Coolify apps service catalogs and capacity model after ADR 0340 landed on main, preserved the rebased `0.177.152` exact-main success, merged the newer `origin/main` head, and reran the full Label Studio converge on merged head `cb7a375c784347f600f136a73ed91991808fb828` before promoting the protected release surfaces.
